case_title: ALLEN WOO VS. CITI APARTMENTS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT

NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CITI APARTMENTS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AND CITI FUNDING GROUP, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
